_comment: Copy this to termina.config.json (next to server.js) to replace the built-in profiles with your own. Each profile is a predefined local terminal. Commands are always fixed argv arrays run on your own machine. Do not put secrets or offensive tooling here. cwd supports ~ for your home directory.

profiles.label: CONTROL
profiles.description: Main shell in my dev folder

profiles.label: LAB SSH
profiles.note: Set blocked=false only for machines you own/control. Nothing offensive auto-runs.
